name: Vga
description: The VGA (Visual GUI Automation) state machines page for the qontinui-web app. Lists the project's visual GUI automation state machines, with a type filter and a create-new entry point. This spec asserts the page header, the create actions, and the filter control — structure only, never specific state-machine rows (data-driven).

metadata.expectedServerErrorsNote: GENUINELY-UNAVOIDABLE-IN-CI (kept after the 2026-05-25 baseline-500 triage; NOT a fixable backend defect like the ai-tasks/runs/automation-builder/operations waivers, which were removed). GET /api/vga/state is a Next SERVER route (src/app/api/vga/state/route.ts) that connects DIRECTLY to PostgreSQL via vgaQuery (src/lib/db/vga.ts: RUNNER_DATABASE_URL/DATABASE_URL, else a localhost:5433 dev default) — it is NOT a proxy to api.qontinui.io. In CI the Next process has no DB reachable: the staging RDS sits in a private subnet (unreachable from GitHub Actions runners), so the route cannot return a non-5xx without provisioning DB network access to CI. Two compounding facts make a clean fix infeasible here: (1) no DB in CI; (2) even WITH a DB the query would miss — vgaQuery sets `search_path TO runner, public` but `vga_state_machines` is created in the `project` schema (alembic consolidation_phase1_20_tail_specialty), a latent schema-mismatch to fix server-side first. Tracked as a follow-up (give VGA list a backend api.qontinui.io proxy like task-runs/variables, or fix the search_path + expose a CI-reachable read path). Until then this single same-origin 5xx is expected; any OTHER same-origin 5xx on this spec still reds the gate.

states.name: Page header
states.description: Top-of-page heading naming the VGA state machines view.

assertions.description: h1 'VGA state machines' heading anchors the page.
Heading text reads 'VGA state machines' (role+text cross-check).

states.name: Create state machine actions
states.description: Entry points for creating a new VGA state machine — the header link and the primary create button.

assertions.description: Create-new link routes to the VGA state-machine builder.
Primary 'Create state machine' button is present.
Create button reads 'Create state machine' (role+text cross-check).

states.name: State-machine filter
states.description: Type/status filter combobox that scopes the listed state machines (defaults to 'All').

assertions.description: Filter defaults to the 'All' option (role+text cross-check).
